label: Bubble
summary: Candy-plastic 2001: white windows on a pinstriped aqua desktop, gel buttons, and traffic-light window controls.
era: The glossy translucent desktop of the early 2000s, homaged in hard-edged, web-safe blue.
a11y: Every body-text pair passes WCAG AA (validated by scripts/contrast.mjs). Links stay underlined; the gloss is a hard-stop gradient, so nothing pulses.
